visual_findings.label: Facial Expression
visual_findings.summary: Neutral to slightly engaged expression; no overt signs of distress, confusion, or emotional flattening.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient maintains steady eye contact with camera; facial muscles show minimal movement consistent with conversational speech; no visible signs of agitation, fear, or apathy.

visual_findings.label: Gaze and Attention
visual_findings.summary: Consistent visual attention directed toward camera; minimal distraction or disengagement.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient’s gaze remains fixed on camera during speech; no prolonged averted gaze or signs of visual scanning or disorientation.

voice_findings.label: Speech Fluency
voice_findings.summary: Speech is fluent with no observable pauses, repetitions, or word-finding difficulties.
voice_findings.evidence: Speech is continuous and self-correcting without hesitation; no signs of circumlocution or phonemic errors.

voice_findings.label: Speech Clarity
voice_findings.summary: Speech is clear and intelligible; no slurring or articulation issues.
voice_findings.evidence: Audio is clean; no distortion or background interference; words are articulated with standard prosody.

content_findings.label: Self-Introduction
content_findings.summary: Patient introduces self and location clearly and coherently.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'Hello, my name is Xia Yichao and right now I'm in my home. I live in Shanghai, China.'

content_findings.label: Task Description
content_findings.summary: Patient describes current activity with coherent structure and appropriate vocabulary.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'I'm now working in the morning... I'm dealing with the details... I'm doing this all by myself, nobody is carrying me.'

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates coherent speech, consistent visual attention, and appropriate self-reporting. No observable signs of cognitive impairment or emotional dysregulation are present in this single clip. Further clinical evaluation is not indicated based on this clip alone.
evidence_against_risk: Fluent, coherent speech with no word-finding difficulties
Steady eye contact and focused attention
alternative_explanations: The patient may be performing well in a controlled, familiar environment (home setting).
The clip may not capture a full range of cognitive or behavioral domains relevant to dementia screening.
emotional_assessment_findings: No observable signs of distress or anxiety
risk_control_suggestions: Consider longitudinal monitoring if clinical concerns arise.
visit_recommendation: Routine follow-up if new symptoms emerge; no formal cognitive screening indicated at this time.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient data to predict future cognitive decline from a single clip.
context_notes: Clip is usable with clear single speaker and visual focus on target patient.
No evidence of dementia-like impairment observed in this clip.
Patient’s self-report is coherent and contextually appropriate.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
